summary: Comprehensive Phase 2 testing of Pink Lantern platform completed. Backend API: 100% pass rate (29/29 tests). Frontend: All major features working including age gate, premium listings, SEO routes, phone reveal, admin/escort dashboards, and search/filter.

issues: React warnings: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility enhancement recommended

passed_tests: ✅ Age gate overlay - 'I am 18+ — Enter' button works
✅ Homepage loads with listings grid (20 cards)
✅ Premium badges display: TOP FEATURED (gold gradient), FEATURED (gold), VERIFIED (green)
✅ SEO-friendly URL routing: /escort/:city/:slug navigates correctly
✅ ListingDetailPage loads via SEO route with proper meta tags
✅ Phone Reveal button reveals phone number when clicked
✅ WhatsApp/Telegram contact buttons appear after reveal
✅ Report button opens dialog with reason selector and submit
✅ Admin login (admin@pinklantern.com) works - redirects to /admin
✅ Admin dashboard stats panel shows: Total Users (48), Escorts (26), Clients (19), Active Listings (50), Premium (7), Verified (10)
✅ Admin Users tab: verify/unverify/ban buttons functional
✅ Admin Listings tab: featured/top_featured/suspend/approve buttons
✅ Admin Banners tab: create banner works, upload image option available
✅ Escort login (escort1@pinklantern.com) works - redirects to /dashboard
✅ Escort dashboard shows stats: Total Listings, Active, Phone Clicks (39), Phone Reveals (85), Premium (3), Verified status
✅ Escort create listing form has phone_number, whatsapp, telegram fields
✅ Escort premium upgrade dialog: Featured/Top Featured types, 7/30/90 days duration
✅ Premium upgrade mock payment button works
✅ API GET /api/listings returns listings sorted by premium_priority_score
✅ API GET /api/listings/{id} increments view count
✅ API POST /api/listings/{id}/reveal-phone returns phone data
✅ API POST /api/reports creates a report
✅ API GET /api/admin/stats returns comprehensive stats
✅ Footer visible on homepage and listing detail page
✅ Language switcher (EN/FR/ZH) changes UI text
✅ Search functionality filters listings by name
✅ Registration page functional with role selection (Client/Escort)
✅ Favorites toggle on listing cards for logged-in users
✅ Favorites page accessible at /favorites
critical_code_review_comments: Accessibility: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby attribute - add DialogDescription component
Console warning: 'Failed to load resource: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED' on escort dashboard - likely external image URL issue
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used - 48 users (3 admins, 26 escorts, 19 clients), 50 active listings
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 2 features verified working. Age gate bypass: set localStorage 'pl_age_verified' to 'true'. Premium payment is MOCKED via /api/escort/listings/{id}/upgrade-premium. SEO URLs format: /escort/{city}/{slug}. Admin stats show comprehensive metrics including phone_clicks, verified_escorts, premium_listings.
